_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED FOR PTERODACTYL PANEL IMPORT
name: Auralyn Discord Music Bot
author: admin@example.com
description: Runs the Auralyn Discord music bot and its bundled Lavalink server in one Docker container.

installation.script:
#!/bin/ash
set -eu
mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server
echo "Auralyn uses a prebuilt bundled Docker image. No source install is required."

variables.name: Discord Bot Token
variables.description: The Discord bot token. Keep this private and rotate it immediately if exposed.

variables.name: Discord Client ID
variables.description: The Discord application client ID used for slash command registration.

variables.name: Guild ID
variables.description: Optional development guild ID for fast slash command deployment. Leave empty for global commands.

variables.name: Lavalink Password
variables.description: Shared password between the bot and the bundled Lavalink server. Use a long random value.

variables.name: Lavalink Memory
variables.description: Maximum heap for Lavalink, for example 512M, 1G, or 2G.

variables.name: Lavalink Startup Timeout
variables.description: Seconds to wait for Lavalink to become healthy before failing startup.

variables.name: Spotify Client ID
variables.description: Optional Spotify client ID for LavaSrc.

variables.name: Spotify Client Secret
variables.description: Optional Spotify client secret for LavaSrc. Keep private.

variables.name: YouTube PoToken
variables.description: Optional Proof-of-Origin token for YouTube. Unlocks higher-bitrate Opus streams gated by anti-bot checks. Generate alongside Visitor Data via iv-org/youtube-trusted-session-generator. Refresh every few weeks.

variables.name: YouTube Visitor Data
variables.description: Companion to YOUTUBE_PO_TOKEN. Must be the visitorData value the token was issued with — always rotate as a pair.
